title: Web3Port joins Cryptool to shorten the path from idea to funded round
content_html:
Most Web3 founders lose months getting a fundraise off the ground. Matching with the right backers is slow, structuring the round eats engineering time, and onboarding investors is a manual grind.

Web3Port is built to fix the first part of that problem, and from today the protocol is plugged directly into Cryptool. Founders moving through Web3Port now arrive with a curated investor pipeline and practical support behind the round itself: structuring help, investor onboarding, and the operational layer that Cryptool handles on every pool.

It is the first of several partnerships the team is putting in place before the platform opens to the public.
author: Cryptool
